title: Warm Buttery Uruguayan Frankfurter Skillet
description: A buttery and crumbly Uruguayan dish featuring frankfurter, perfect for a date night, and friendly to shojin dietary preferences. This skillet is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced frankfurter and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Sprinkle the paprika, salt, and black pepper over the frankfurter mixture and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
Serve the frankfurter skillet with crusty bread or over rice.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
